## Problem

What repo-level or product-level problem are we solving? Explain why this work
exists before specifying behavior or implementation sequence.

## Users and surfaces

Who benefits, and which repo or product surfaces are involved?

- CLI
- LSP / editor extension
- generated GitHub CI
- reviewers
- coding agents
- maintainers

## Success criteria

Name the outcomes that make the proposal worth accepting. Keep them reviewable.

-

## Proposed shape

Describe the recommended product or repo shape. Keep behavior details in linked

## Alternatives considered

evidence.

closeout artifacts expected for the lane.

-

-

## Exit criteria

When can this proposal move to accepted, implemented, superseded, or rejected?
